data.title: VanEck Moves Closer To US Binance Coin ETF — But Will The SEC Play Ball?
data.description:
VanEck has made a big move in bringing a Binance Coin (CRYPTO: BNB) ETF to the United States. The company recently registered for a BNB ETF trust in the state of Delaware, an important milestone for the crypto asset. ​
source: https://www.benzinga.com/etfs/new-etfs/25/04/44633519/vaneck-moves-closer-to-us-binance-coin-etf-but-will-the-sec-play-ball?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Pre-seed crypto startup deals have grown 767% since 2021: Report
data.description:
The number of pre-seed funding rounds for Bitcoin (BTC) startup companies has grown by 767% since 2021, according to a report from venture capital firm Trammell Venture Partners (TVP). Bitcoin pre-seed transactions increased 50% year-over-year in 2024, with a 27. 5% year-over-year increase in the number of startup companies funded. Christopher Calicott, TVP's managing director, attributed the increased deals to the robust security of the BTC network:"Many entrepreneurs across crypto are revisiting the Bitcoin stack as the long-term place to build their companies
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/pre-seed-bitcoin-funding-deals-report?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Treasure DAO Shutdown Sends MAGIC Token Down 18%
data.description:
Treasure DAO's remaining $2. 4M treasury would have been depleted by mid-2025 without drastic cuts to operations and staff.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/treasure-dao-shutdown-sends-magic-token-down-18/

data.title: ‘On-Chain Death Cross’: Bitcoin Flashing Pattern That’s Historically Preceded Bearish Trend, Warns Glassnode
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) may be on the verge of entering a bearish trend based on a historic market pattern signal, according to digital asset analytics firm Glassnode. Glassnode says that the one-month and six-month volume-weighted average price (VWAP) metrics are signaling that Bitcoin may enter a months-long downtrend.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/03/on-chain-death-cross-bitcoin-flashing-pattern-thats-historically-preceded-bearish-trend-warns-glassnode/

data.title: Crypto wallet maker Trezor says it’s already adapting to Trump tariffs
data.description:
The Czech-based crypto wallet firm said the future “remains uncertain” after Donald Trump announced sweeping and hard-hitting tariffs.
source: https://protos.com/crypto-wallet-maker-trezor-says-its-already-adapting-to-trump-tariffs/

data.title: US lawmakers vote to advance anti-CBDC bill
data.description:
The US House Financial Services Committee has advanced a bill aimed at preventing federal banks from using or issuing central bank digital currencies, or CBDCs, paving the way for a vote in the chamber. In an April 2 committee session, lawmakers voted 27-22 in favor of passing the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act. The bill was one of five the committee considered in a markup hearing discussing possible amendments. Lawmakers also approved a bill regulating payment stablecoins, setting up the legislation for a full House vote
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-lawmakers-vote-advance-anti-cbdc-bill?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Saylor’s Strategy couldn't escape Trump’s tariff burn, dips 7%
data.description:
Strategy dipped 7. 71% within a day of Trump announcing the global tariffs. However, the development didn’t dampen the spirits of founder Michael Saylor.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/saylors-strategy-cant-escape-trumps-tariff-burn-dips-7

data.title: Recession will mainly be limited to the US, the rest of the world is about to boom – Sir Schiff
data.description:
Economist and gold advocate Peter Schiff said on Thursday that with the Trump tariffs, the US would soon find itself in a recession, but the rest of the world would thrive. “The rest of the world is about to boom, as they will be liberated from having to subsidize the US economy,” he wrote. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/recession-will-mainly-be-limited-to-the-us/

data.title: Bitcoin drops 8%, US markets shed $2T in value — Should traders expect an oversold bounce?
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) and US stock markets all sold off sharply after US President Donald Trump shook up financial markets by announcing a list of reciprocal tariffs on several countries. On April 3, the S&P 500 saw a 4. 2% drop at market open, its most significant single-day decline since June 2020. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 3
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-drops-8-us-markets-shed-2-t-in-value-should-traders-expect-an-oversold-bounce?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chairman Jefferson: There is still great uncertainty in trade policy and it takes time to evaluate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Federal Reserve Vice Chairman Jefferson declined to provide any details on how the Trump administration's sweeping tariffs will affect his views on the economic and monetary policy outlook, although he seemed to hint at some concerns that they could have a dampening effect on economic growth. "There is still a lot of uncertainty about trade, and that uncertainty will certainly put pressure on household and business investment," Jefferson said in response to questions about trade policy. He said he is assessing not only the impact of trade policy, but also the net impact of all new policies, including fiscal, immigration and regulation. "We are in a situation where it is important to take the time to think carefully about their impact." (Jin Shi)
